steps.name: migration-rule-create
steps.command: nbx api resource create --env dev --resource migrationRules --values-file "E:\\work\\nocobase\\packages\\plugins\\@nocobase\\plugin-publish-manager\\.nocobase\\publish-e2e\\runs\\migration-generate-copy-2026-04-29T11-45-17-665Z\\migration-rule-values.json" --json-output

steps.name: migration-generate
steps.command: nbx publish generate --type migration --env dev --rule "<created-migration-rule-id>" --title publish-e2e-dev-to-dev --wait

steps.name: migration-copy
steps.command: nbx publish copy --type migration --from dev --to dev --file "<generated-migration-file>.nbdata"
